title: Angel Biscuits
instructions: Dissolve yeast in tepid water with teaspoon of sugar.  Combine flour, 4 tbsp. sugar, baking powder, soda and salt.  Cut in butter, then add buttermilk with yeast mixture.  Mix thoroughly, then knead a few minutes on floured surface until smooth.  Put in covered bowl and let stand 1 hour (doesn’t have to be quite that long) or until doubled in bulk.  Punch down dough and roll out about ½ inch thick.  Cut into biscuits with a floured 1 ½ inch cookie cutter.  Place on ungreased cookie sheet.  Bake at 400 degrees for 10 – 12 minutes or until light brown.
notes: This recipe was given to me by my angel friend, Cheryl Peirce. It is very adaptable! I use this recipe for strawberry shortcake by brushing biscuits with cream and topping with sugar before baking.
